title: Custom E-Commerce Web & Mobile Application
scope: Custom headless Next.js storefront for optimal SEO and sub-second loading speeds.
Cross-platform iOS and Android mobile app using React Native.
Shopify Plus integration for product catalog, checkout flow, and inventory synchronization.
Stripe payment gateway integration supporting standard credit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
User authentication, order history, wishlists, and customized loyalty program dashboard.
Admin analytics panel for tracking sales, visitor counts, and system health.
deliverables: High-fidelity Figma mockups and interactive UI/UX wireframes.
Production-ready Next.js web storefront and React Native mobile application source code.
Secure backend APIs built on Node.js and PostgreSQL database schema.
Comprehensive API documentation and third-party integration mapping.
Automated testing suite and manual QA test verification logs.
Production deployment to AWS or Vercel and transfer of credentials.

title: Salesforce CRM Integration & ERP Middleware Sync
scope: Develop custom Python (FastAPI) middleware to broker communications between Salesforce CRM and legacy ERP.
Configure Apache Kafka event stream for real-time inventory adjustments and price syncs.
Implement Apex triggers and Salesforce flows to automate account and lead handoffs.
Construct a secure PostgreSQL audit logging system to record transaction failures and retry attempts.
Deploy middleware components as serverless AWS Lambda microservices for maximum scalability.
deliverables: Detailed Data Mapping & System Architecture diagram.
Salesforce Apex Class code and customized Page Layout configurations.
Python Middleware codebase (hosted on GitHub) with full unit test coverage.
Grafana Monitoring dashboard showing queue lag and sync error rates.
User training guides and developer handoff documentation.

title: AWS Cloud Migration, Security Hardening & CI/CD Pipeline
scope: Migrate existing bare-metal VM application architecture to AWS Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS).
Draft infrastructure configurations purely as code using Terraform to enable multi-environment setups.
Construct robust, secure CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions for automatic staging and production deployments.
Implement Prometheus and Grafana for monitoring cluster memory, CPU, and request response cycles.
Establish strict AWS WAF rules and IAM policies to align with SOC2 compliance guidelines.
deliverables: Terraform IAC scripts for AWS resources configuration.
GitHub Actions workflow files for build, test, and container deployment.
Kubernetes YAML configuration manifests and Helm charts.
Grafana alerting parameters and system dashboard templates.
SOC2 Infrastructure Readiness report detailing access logs and encryption mechanisms.

title: Real-Time IoT Fleet Telematics & Analytics Platform
scope: Deploy an MQTT broker (EMQX) to ingest telemetry data from 10,000+ simultaneous fleet devices.
Build a React-based dispatcher portal featuring real-time interactive mapping with Leaflet.js.
Create a geofencing engine that alerts administrators via SMS/Email using Twilio/Amazon SES.
Configure TimescaleDB database schema optimized for high-volume time-series location data.
Develop analytical reports modules using Pandas to compute vehicle efficiency, idle times, and route adherence.
deliverables: IoT message schema design and integration specification doc.
React dispatcher frontend source code and Docker container setup.
FastAPI IoT ingestion backend server code.
Configured TimescaleDB database setup files.
Full load test evaluation showing broker stability under 12k concurrent connections.
